T~L~550~-455~0~#0000FF~~~~~~comment~The capacitance of the FLASH pin 
should be lower than EN to allow the
former to have a stable 3.3 V voltage 
before the latter. This ensures boots
with no spourious download modes.~1~start~gge54059~0~pinpart
